heading: Acquisition of winter range, land, and helicopter landing site
label: 580i Acquisition of winter range, land, and helicopter landing site

children.label: a
children.text: such sums as may be necessary for the acquisition of parcels of land and interests in land in Sanders County, Montana, needed by the Forest Service to provide winter range for its saddle, pack, and draft animals;

children.label: b
children.text: not to exceed $50,000 for the acquisition of additional land adjacent to the present site of the Forest Products Laboratory at Madison, Wisconsin; and

children.label: c
children.text: not to exceed $25,000 for the acquisition of one helicopter landing site in southern California.
